title: AFK Hunger
description: Slowly deduct food from idle players to discourage idling
body:
# AFK Hunger
This is a simple and lightweight plugin that deducts food from players that are idle in order to discourage idling. Configuration allows you to specify amount of time before player is considered idle, amount of time between deducting food, and the interval for checking if player is actually idle.

## Instructions
1. Download the plugin or compile it yourself
2. Drag and drop the plugin into your server plugins folder
3. Run or reload your server
4. The configuration for this plugin is found in `plugins/afkhunger/config.yml`
